title: onobrychis ebenoides var. carnea
intro: Onobrychis ebenoides var. carnea, also known as the pink-spotted bird's foot trefoil, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family, characterized by its unique pink or pinkish-purple flowers. The plant is said to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat various health issues such as digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Onobrychis ebenoides var. carnea include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can aid in soothing skin irritations and promoting wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for internal use, and it can also be used topically in the form of creams or ointments.
